ksa_text: Ability to conduct risk analyses of systems, applications, and business processes to identify compliance-related risks and assess organizational impact.

dcwf.top_element_label: Interpret and apply applicable laws, statutes, and regulatory documents and integrate into policy.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of language processing tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Interpret and apply applicable laws, statutes, and regulatory documents and integrate into policy.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RC-A-003 (RC, Ability) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4692 is insufficient to establish relevance to financial risk analytics, quantitative risk modeling, and data-driven risk assessment at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (ddat=0.469, nist_ai_rmf=0.434, onet=0.431) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4692 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does RC-domain KSA RC-A-003 (composite 0.4692) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: RC domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per GDPR, CCPA, SOX; compliance competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data handling obligations, not compliance program ownership. Composite 0.4692 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms RC domain KSA at composite 0.4692 is not a standard requirement for Financial Risk Specialist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4692, domain RC, scope weak fit. High confidence.
